---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report a problem or suggest improvements to documentation
title: '[DOCS] <brief description>'
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

body:
  - type: markdown
  attributes:
    value: |
      ## Documentation Issue
      What documentation issue did you encounter?

      ## Page/Section
      Which documentation page or section has the issue?

      ## Problem
      Is information missing, unclear, or incorrect?

      ## Suggested Fix
      How should the documentation be improved?

      ## Screenshots
      If helpful, add screenshots to illustrate the issue.

      ## Additional Context
      Any other information about the documentation issue?
    render: markdown
